content:
type: REVISE
my_files: src/jinja2/loaders.py
your_files: src/jinja2/loaders.py
note: Genuine overlap: my feature only touches FileSystemLoader (__init__, get_source, list_templates) adding fallback_searchpath. Since we can't split by file, let's split by convention to minimize merge conflicts: (1) I add fallback_searchpath as the LAST param in FileSystemLoader.__init__ signature, after any params you add there for path_transform - please add path_transform BEFORE where fallback_searchpath would go (i.e. right after existing params, before my new param), (2) I'll only touch get_source()'s path-resolution loop to add a fallback pass after the primary loop finishes (searching self.searchpath then self.fallback_searchpath) - if your path_transform needs to modify path resolution too, apply it at the point paths are joined/checked so both changes compose (transform applied per-path, fallback adds more paths to iterate), (3) I'll extend list_templates() to include fallback dirs - if you touch list_templates for path_transform, apply it at name-transform time separately from my dir-iteration change. Ok?
